TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cliff Anderson nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Cliff Anderson i 1967 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Angeles Lakers putiput. 9 bulad 7 demiad, 1944 a mihca, Cliff Anderson, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶r~…æiff and…ôrson nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i am…ôri ¶an, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶r~…æiff and…ôrson i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu a≈ã…ôr~…æ…ôs r~…æak…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶r~…æiff and…ôrson, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Cliff Anderson nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Cliff Anderson i 1967 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Angeles Lakers putiput. 9 bulad 7 demiad, 1944 a mihca, Cliff Anderson, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶r~…æiff and…ôrson nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i am…ôri ¶an, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶r~…æiff and…ôrson i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu a≈ã…ôr~…æ…ôs r~…æak…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶r~…æiff and…ôrson, miunduaj.
